featured_projects.title: AasaMedChem – AI-Powered Medical Chemistry Platform
featured_projects.description: A modern healthcare and medicinal chemistry platform designed to provide intelligent insights, interactive user experiences, and streamlined access to medical chemistry information.
features: AI-powered medical chemistry insights
Modern healthcare dashboard and data visualization
Streamlined access to medicinal chemistry information
Interactive user experience and responsive layouts

featured_projects.title: Spreetail – Modern E-Commerce Platform
featured_projects.description: A responsive e-commerce application featuring product discovery, modern UI design, optimized user experience, and scalable frontend architecture.
features: Product discovery with advanced searching and filtering
Modern glassmorphic UI design and smooth page transitions
Scalable frontend architecture with React components
Optimized page load speed and client-side performance

featured_projects.title: WorkBalance – Employee & Team Management System
featured_projects.description: Full-stack employee and team management platform supporting organizational workflows, employee coordination, and productivity management.
features: Full-stack team management and workflow orchestration
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and security middleware
Real-time coordination and productivity tracking dashboard
RESTful API design with Express.js and MongoDB database

featured_projects.title: Paisa Bachao – Finance Tracker
featured_projects.description: Personal finance management application for tracking expenses, budgeting, and monitoring financial habits with interactive analytics.
features: Expense tracking and personal budgeting categories
Interactive analytics and data charts
Multi-session data sync and persistence
Clean responsive Tailwind interface

collaborative_projects.title: Travelscape – AI Travel Planning Platform
collaborative_projects.description: Travel platform integrating destination discovery, hotel recommendations, itinerary planning, and travel booking functionality.
features: AI-driven destination discovery and hotel matching
Dynamic itinerary planning assistant
Travel booking workflow integration
Backend system in Laravel with MySQL database

collaborative_projects.title: Electrosystem – Hybrid Renewable Energy Platform
collaborative_projects.description: Platform focused on renewable energy management, hybrid system modeling, and sustainable energy solutions combining wind, solar, and battery storage.
features: Hybrid renewable energy generation modeling (solar/wind)
Intelligent flow management simulation
Sustainable energy cost analysis tool

other_projects.title: TechnoGrowX – Smart Agriculture Support Platform

Soil health and crop diagnostic analytics dashboard

other_projects.title: Drug Review Sentiment Analysis
other_projects.description: Machine learning project that analyzes drug reviews and performs sentiment classification using natural language processing techniques.
features: Text preprocessing and TF-IDF vectorization
Sentiment classification modeling using Random Forest
Scikit-learn pipeline optimization for medicine reviews

other_projects.title: Smart Study Planner

features: Kanban study task management and focus timers
Study progress tracking with streak multipliers
Chart.js performance analytics visualization

other_projects.description: Expense reporting platform with chatbot-assisted interactions for generating and managing expense reports efficiently.

Expense report generation and formatting
Interactive AI dialogue flows

other_projects.title: Docker + AWS EC2 Deployment – Glassmorphism Calculator
other_projects.description: Containerized calculator application deployed on AWS EC2, demonstrating Docker image creation, DockerHub integration, and cloud deployment practices.

Deployed container instance on AWS EC2 node
DockerHub image versioning pipeline

other_projects.title: Jenkins Local Setup using Docker
other_projects.description: One-click Jenkins setup using Docker Compose with persistent storage, networking configuration, and complete setup documentation.
features: Docker Compose configuration for one-click deployment
Volume mounts for persistent Jenkins build workspace configurations
Isolated virtual bridge network setup

other_projects.title: CI/CD Automation – Jenkins + Docker + AWS EC2
other_projects.description: Automated CI/CD pipeline for an Aviation Blog application including source checkout, image build, deployment, health checks, and cleanup stages.
features: Automated Jenkins pipeline execution on code push webhooks

Health checks and container cleanup stages

other_projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline using GitHub + Jenkins + Docker
